layers.description: Shell-free DTOs, no_std/reusable cores, wire contracts, and public SDK contracts that must not depend on host orchestration or app shells.
Reusable host-injection contracts and embeddable adapter facades that may depend on green contracts but not desktop shells.
Agent/controller/provider/config/session orchestration and services that wire reusable facades into product policy.
CLI/TUI/daemon/plugin/runtime bridges and developer tooling that may depend downward but should not be imported by lower layers.

ast_constructor_guard.description: Green contracts and host facades must not import or construct orchestration/application-shell crate paths; use an owning adapter or add a reviewed exception.
